page_content:
Restriction: Permission of ARCH-Architecture Program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARCH797 Thesis Proseminar (3 Credits) Directed research and preparation of thesis program. Prerequisite: ARCH601.

ARCH798 Thesis in Architecture (3 Credits)

Complements the research of ARCH 799, with presentation of the design research to student's thesis committee.
